critic_raw:
ASSESSOR 1:
Auto-decline holiday policy is a direct chargeback reducer independent of model quality. Seasonal comparison is uncontrolled. No fixed-rules backtest. Verdict: critique_wins.
defender_raw:
ASSESSOR 2:
Model improvements are real. But auto-declining high-loss merchant categories eliminates their chargebacks regardless of the model. The production 23% reduction could be entirely policy-driven. Verdict: critique_wins.
adjudication_raw:
ASSESSOR 3:
Consensus: holiday policy confound, seasonal shift, no controlled backtest.

SYNTHESIS:
Uniform critique_wins. Holiday routing policy is primary mechanism.

ETD SPECIFICATION:
- Measure: Model precision and recall on a fixed transaction sample from a non-holiday period with both old and new models under identical downstream rules
- Success criterion: New model shows no material improvement on fixed-sample backtest — policy explains the production result
- Failure criterion: New model shows materially higher precision and recall on fixed-sample backtest

empirical_test.measure: Precision and recall on fixed non-holiday transaction sample under identical downstream rules
empirical_test.success_criterion: No material improvement — production savings were policy-driven
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Materially higher precision and recall — genuine model improvement
